description: Silver coloured steel case with a fixed bezel for durability, style and comfortBrown leather strap with a tang claspBrown coloured dial with silver coloured hands Brand logo at the 9 hour mark and date aperture at the 6 hour markScrew to reset timeSolid case back for enhanced durabilityWater resistance up to 50 meters, allowing you to use it even when showering or in light rainWarranty: 2 years
